lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਬਸੰਤੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ਘਰੁ ੧ ਚਉਪਦੇ ਦੁਤੁਕੇ ॥
lines.translit: raag basant mahalaa 1 ghar 1 chaupade dutuke |
lines.english: Raag Basant, First Mehl, First House, Chau-Padhay, Dho-Thukay:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਨਿਰਵੈਰੁ ਅਕਾਲ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਅਜੂਨੀ ਸੈਭੰ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar sat naam karataa purakh nirbhau niravair akaal moorat ajoonee saibhan gur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. Truth Is The Name. Creative Being Personified. No Fear. No Hatred. Image Of The Undying. Beyond Birth. Self-Existent. By Guru's Grace:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰਫੜੁ ਚਿਤ ਸਮਾਲਿ ਸੋਇ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਗੋਬਿੰਦੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: parafarr chit samaal soe sadaa sadaa gobind |1|
lines.english: Blossom forth, O my consciousness, contemplating the Lord of the Universe, forever and ever. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਹਾ ਮਾਹ ਮੁਮਾਰਖੀ ਚੜਿਆ ਸਦਾ ਬਸੰਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: maahaa maah mumaarakhee charriaa sadaa basant |
lines.english: Among the months, blessed is this month, when spring always comes.
O ignorant one, forget your egotistical intellect.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਰਿ ਬੀਚਾਰਿ ਮਨ ਗੁਣ ਵਿਚਿ ਗੁਣੁ ਲੈ ਸਾਰਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: haumai maar beechaar man gun vich gun lai saar |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Subdue your ego, and contemplate Him in your mind; gather in the virtues of the Sublime, Virtuous Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਤ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਛਾਵ ਘਣੀ ਚੂਕਾ ਮਨ ਅਭਿਮਾਨੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: pat paraapat chhaav ghanee chookaa man abhimaan |2|
lines.english: Realization of the Lord are the leaves, and eradication of the pride of the mind is the shade. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮ ਪੇਡੁ ਸਾਖਾ ਹਰੀ ਧਰਮੁ ਫੁਲੁ ਫਲੁ ਗਿਆਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: karam pedd saakhaa haree dharam ful fal giaan |
lines.english: Karma is the tree, the Lord's Name the branches, Dharmic faith the flowers, and spiritual wisdom the fruit.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਤਿ ਕਾ ਧਨੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਹੋਆ ਲਾਗਾ ਸਹਜਿ ਧਿਆਨੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: pat kaa dhan pooraa hoaa laagaa sehaj dhiaan |3|
lines.english: attains the perfect wealth of honor, and intuitively focuses his meditation on the Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਖੀ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਕੰਨੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਮੁਖਿ ਆਖਣੁ ਸਚੁ ਨਾਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: akhee kudarat kanee baanee mukh aakhan sach naam |
lines.english: Whoever sees the Lord's Creative Power with his eyes, and hears the Guru's Bani with his ears, and utters the True Name with his mouth,

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰੇ ਨ ਸੂਕਹੀ ਜਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਰਹੇ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak hare na sookahee ji guramukh rahe samaae |4|1|
lines.english: O Nanak, those Gurmukhs who remain merged in the Lord do not wither away; they remain green forever. ||4||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਹਾ ਰੁਤੀ ਆਵਣਾ ਵੇਖਹੁ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: maahaa rutee aavanaa vekhahu karam kamaae |
lines.english: The months and the seasons come; see, and do your deeds.
The season of spring, so delightful, has come.
First Mehl, Basant:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਰਵਹਿ ਸਿ ਤੇਰੈ ਚਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: rang raate raveh si terai chaae |
lines.english: Those who are imbued with love for You, O Lord, chant Your Name with joy.
Whom else should I worship? At whose feet should I bow? ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਗਜੀਵਨ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਨ ਮਿਲੈ ਕਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jagajeevan jugat na milai kaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: O Life of the Universe, there is no other way to meet You. ||1||Pause||
I am the slave of Your slaves, O my Sovereign Lord King.
Which one should I worship? Before which one should I burn incense?
You have only One Form, and yet You have countless forms.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰਾ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ਕਹਾ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: teraa ant na paaeaa kahaa paae |
lines.english: Your limits cannot be found. How can anyone find them?
I am the slave of Your slaves, O my Sovereign Lord King. ||2||
The cycles of years and the places of pilgrimage are Yours, O Lord.
Your State cannot be known, O Eternal, Unchanging Lord God.
Although You are unknown, still we chant Your Name. ||3||
Your Name is True, O Transcendent Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀ ਜਾਉ ਜੇਤੇ ਤੇਰੇ ਨਾਵ ਹੈ ॥੪॥੨॥
lines.translit: balihaaree jaau jete tere naav hai |4|2|
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to Your Names, as many as there are, O Lord. ||4||2||
All people praise the One Lord.
Nanak places his head on the feet of such people.
What can poor Nanak say?
Basant, First Mehl:
The kitchen is golden, and the cooking pots are golden.
The lines marking the cooking square are silver.
The food is soft rice, cooked in milk. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੰਗਾ ਕਾ ਉਦਕੁ ਕਰੰਤੇ ਕੀ ਆਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: gangaa kaa udak karante kee aag |
lines.english: The water is from the Ganges, and the firewood is sanctified.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੇ ਮਨ ਲੇਖੈ ਕਬਹੂ ਨ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: re man lekhai kabahoo na paae |
lines.english: O my mind, these things are worthless,
